name: quickfilereader

metadata.name: quickfilereader
metadata.summary: A library for reading files in one line.

documentation:
# quickfilereader
A library for quick file reading.

functions.name: quickfilereader.read_pdf
documentation:
Read content from a PDF file.

Args:
    file_path (str): Path to the PDF file
    start_page (int, optional): Starting page to read. Defaults to 0.
    end_page (Optional[int], optional): Ending page to read. Defaults to None (read all pages).

Returns:
    str: Extracted PDF text

functions.name: quickfilereader.read_txt
documentation:
Read content from a text file.

Args:
    file_path (str): Path to the text file

Returns:
    str: File contents

functions.name: quickfilereader.read_docs
documentation:
Read content from a Word document.

Args:
    file_path (str): Path to the Word document

Returns:
    str: Extracted document text

functions.name: quickfilereader.read_excel
documentation:
Read content from an Excel file.

Args:
    file_path (str): Path to the Excel file

Returns:
    str: Excel file contents as a string

functions.name: quickfilereader.read_csv
documentation:
Read content from a CSV file.

Args:
    file_path (str): Path to the CSV file

Returns:
    str: CSV file contents as a string

functions.name: quickfilereader.read_any_file
documentation:
Read file content automatically based on file extension.

Args:
    file_path (str): Path to the file
    start_page (int, optional): Starting page for PDF files
    end_page (Optional[int], optional): Ending page for PDF files

Returns:
    str: File contents

Raises:
    ValueError: If file type is not supported
